SessionEvents.// ReplayMode: Default replay mode for GET /api/sessions/{id}/events. 'Incremental' returns only events with seq > since (the normal catch-up path). 'Full' ignores `since` and returns every event from seq 1 — use this as the kill switch if incremental replay ever produces a gap. The client may override per-request via ?mode=.

OtlpFanout.// SeqBaseUrl: Base URL of the Seq OTLP ingest endpoint (e.g. http://seq:5341/ingest/otlp). Empty = skip the Seq leg.
OtlpFanout.// SeqApiKey: Optional X-Seq-ApiKey attached to every Seq-bound POST.
OtlpFanout.// Aspire leg: The Aspire dashboard leg is not modelled here — OtlpFanout reads OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT / OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS at runtime (injected by Aspire when hosted under the AppHost).
